description: 'For game environments. View the entire scope of the files. update the documentation, and make sure to include all relevant game mechanics, character abilities, and item descriptions and so on. Ensure that the documentation is clear, concise, and easy to navigate for players of all levels. Fully articulates scope of the game, and the documentation should be comprehensive and cover all aspects of the game, including gameplay mechanics, character abilities, item descriptions, and any other relevant information. The documentation should be organized in a way that is easy to navigate, with clear headings and sections for different topics. It should also be written in a clear and concise manner, making it accessible to players of all levels of experience. Must include everything and be updated with the most recent changes to the game. Can split into multiple files if necessary, but should be organized in a way that is easy to navigate and understand.'
